creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
I am running apache24-2.4.59 with mod_php82-8.2.18 on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE-p10 and even when I add apache24_aslr_disable="YES" into /etc/rc.conf and restart apache24 it still does crash on 'apachectl graceful'.

Is there any way I can help in further debugging this?

Initially as a workaround I have just removed /usr/local/etc/php/ext-10-opcache.ini, but that gets re-created after a php update, so I have now removed www/php82-opcache completely.
